title: Object - Vesting Start Transaction
description: Version dispatcher for the vesting-start transaction. Its single shape (v1) is marked `planned_deprecation`: still fully supported in the current/stable surface, but the vesting commencement date it carried moves onto the issuance (`EquityCompensationIssuance.vesting_start_date`) in the shape OCF is moving toward, so this transaction is omitted from the `unstable` preview.
